items.title:
[正面] 上头的卡牌游戏 克苏鲁风格 roguelite 每局都好玩，1周玩了快60小时。。。福利很好 
PV...
items.summary:
上头的卡牌游戏 克苏鲁风格 roguelite 每局都好玩，1周玩了快60小时。。。福利很好 
PVE 算力构筑 对的上xp的 一玩就是天亮了系列
送的和活动给的资源非常多， 主线做做 活动玩玩 ，不氪金游戏自带送的4小只强度很高 搭配很灵活配队不死绑，自由度非常高 ，0氪就能全破 能体验到游戏所有内容，有点追求的 氪完双倍就能爽玩
PVP 对战 纯公平 良心卡牌竞技 ，现在这样的二游卡牌 PVP

items.title: [正面] Slay the Spire gameplay + Reverse 1999-like story...
items.summary:
Slay the Spire gameplay + Reverse 1999-like story but lovecraftian, story has been cool so far
Morimens is also generous with pulls, so there's no issue w/ progressing w/o spending money

items.title: [负面] The English language setting did nothing for me, t...
items.summary: The English language setting did nothing for me, the game language continued to be Chinese even after re-logging in. If the English would work, I would be happy to give the game another shot.
